project.name: Vibrante-Node
project.description: Visual node-based pipeline automation tool for VFX studios. Connects Prism Pipeline, Blender, Houdini, Maya, and Deadline Render Farm through a Qt-based node graph UI.

core_modules.src/core/engine.py: Async execution engine — runs the node graph, resolves execution order, fires execute()
core_modules.src/core/registry.py: Node registry — discovers and loads all .json node definitions from nodes/
core_modules.src/nodes/base.py: BaseNode — all nodes inherit from this. Provides add_input, add_output, log_info, log_error
core_modules.src/utils/prism_core.py: resolve_prism_core() — checks inputs, global cache, shared memory. Auto-bootstrapped from prism_core_init node
core_modules.src/utils/prism_config.py: Dynamic Prism config reader — reads pipeline.json, resolves dept folders, NO hardcoded abbreviations
core_modules.src/utils/hou_bridge.py: TCP bridge to live Houdini session (JSON-RPC on localhost)
core_modules.src/utils/qt_compat.py: Qt5/Qt6 compatibility shim for Prism's shiboken requirements
core_modules.src/utils/config_manager.py: App-level config (window state, recent files, etc.)

node_format.exec_nodes: use_exec=true — include exec_in/exec_out ports. super().__init__() adds them automatically — never add manually.
node_format.data_nodes: use_exec=false — pure data transformation, no exec ports

Houdini.pattern: houdini_headless (batch) + live TCP bridge via hou_bridge.py

prism_integration.core_resolution: resolve_prism_core(inputs) — checks inputs dict, global cache, then shared memory. Auto-shared, no wiring required.

known_api_issues.getScenefiles: Returns empty even with enriched entity — always use disk scan fallback
known_api_issues.getDepartments: Does not exist on ProjectEntities — read from pipeline.json globals
known_api_issues.getTaskNames: Decorator re-raises as BaseException, bypasses except Exception — removed
known_api_issues.getEntityPath_getShotPath: Do not exist — use entity.get('path') directly
known_api_issues.getShots_unpack: May return (sequences, shots) or single list — always use try/except unpack
known_api_issues.getCategories: Returns UI tabs (Scenefiles/Renders/Exports), NOT departments — do not use for dept listing

key_functions: resolve_cfg(core, entity, project, cfg_path) -> str | None

example_workflow_prism_demo_02.description: Prism project traversal → scene path resolution → Deadline Blender submission

known_issues.google_generativeai_deprecation: collect_all('google.generativeai') in spec triggers FutureWarning — package deprecated, migrate to google.genai when ready
known_issues.tzdata_missing: PyInstaller warns 'Hidden import tzdata not found' — non-critical, optional timezone data
known_issues.sip_missing: PyInstaller warns 'Hidden import sip not found' — non-critical, already bundled via PyQt5
known_issues.python310_eol_warning: google.api_core warns Python 3.10 EOL 2026-10-04 — plan upgrade to 3.11+ for next major release

dcc_paths.houdini: hython path configured per-node in houdini_headless
dcc_paths.maya: mayapy path configured per-node in maya_headless

patterns.prism_node_skeleton:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode
from src.utils.prism_core import resolve_prism_core
from src.utils.prism_config import resolve_cfg, get_departments, resolve_dept_folder

class MyPrismNode(BaseNode):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__(use_exec=False)
        self.add_input('core', 'any')
        self.add_input('entity', 'dict')
        self.add_output('result', 'string')

    async def execute(self, inputs):
        core = resolve_prism_core(inputs)
        entity = inputs.get('entity') or {}
        defaults = {'result': ''}
        cfg_path = resolve_cfg(core=core, entity=entity)
        return defaults

def register_node():
    return MyPrismNode
patterns.version_format: f'v{n:0{padding}d}'  # padding from pipeline.json globals.versionPadding, default 4
patterns.disk_scan_scene_files: Use os.scandir(task_dir), filter by SCENE_EXTS, exclude META_SUFFIXES ('versioninfo.json', 'preview.jpg')
